post.body:
A sharp new razor
A fresh new cut
A long sleeve tee shirt
And a bandaid for the game

A silent scream
A little tear
A fake smile
And another bad day

The tears wont stop
But the smile is left there
So no one knows
The secret behind my smile

An aching pain
That wont go away
It sits in my heart
It's there to stay

Seeing the look
Of a disapointed friend
Is the worse feeling ever
But the pain is all thats needed

As selfish as it is
To leave everyone feeling helpless
but everyday and everynight
